zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna de Clarell於1266年出生在英國越可爾迪可爾時，她的父親William de Clarell III47歲，母親Johanna34歲。她於大約1277年與Robert d'Aldwark在英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年在英國越可爾阿爾德瓦可享年26歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna de Clarell于1266年出生在英国越可爾迪可爾时，她的父亲William de Clarell III47岁，母亲Johanna34岁。她于大约1277年与Robert d'Aldwark在英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年在英国越可爾阿爾德瓦可享年26岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna de Clarell was born in 1266, in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, her father, William de Clarell III, was 47 and her mother, Johanna, was 34. She married Robert d'Aldwark about 1277, in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1292, in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna de Clarell est née en 1266, à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William de Clarell III, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Johanna, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Robert d'Aldwark environ 1277, à Aldwark, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1292, à Aldwark, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 26 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna de Clarell 1266 in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Clarell III 47 und ihre Mutter Johanna 34. Sie hat um 1277 in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England Robert d'Aldwark geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1292 im Alter von 26 Jahren in Aldwark, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Clarell è nata il nel 1266 nel Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, William de Clarell III, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Johanna, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Robert d'Aldwark circa 1277, nel Aldwark, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1292, nel Aldwark, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 26 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna de Clarellが1266年にイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルで生まれた時，父William de Clarell IIIは47歳，母Johannaは34歳であった。約1277年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークでRobert d'Aldwarkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルドワークで26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna de Clarell(이)가 1266년 영국 요르크실르 티크힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Clarell III(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 대략 1277년 영국 요르크실르 알드워크에서 Robert d'Aldwark(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 영국 요르크실르 알드워크에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna de Clarell nasceu em 1266, em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Clarell III, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Johanna, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert d'Aldwark aproximadamente 1277, em Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1292, em Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna de Clarell родилась в 1266 г. в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Clarell III было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert d'Aldwark около 1277 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1292 г. в местности алдварк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 26 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna de Clarell nació en 1266, en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Clarell III, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Johanna, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Robert d'Aldwark aproximadamente 1277, en Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1292, en Aldwark, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 26 años.
